text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
3 
ADJUST_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Adjustment Code 
DESCRIPTION: Code indicating the type of adjustment record. 
SHORT NAME: ADJUST_CD 
LONG NAME: ADJUST_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
0 = Original claim/encounter 
1 = Void/Reversal of a prior submission 
2 = Re-submittal 
3 = Credit
